scripts.pack:dev: pnpm run build && pnpm run stage && electron-builder --dir
scripts.make: pnpm run build && pnpm run stage && electron-builder
scripts.make:mac: pnpm run build && pnpm run stage -- --platform darwin && electron-builder --mac
scripts.make:mac:x64: pnpm run build && pnpm run stage -- --platform darwin --arch x64 && electron-builder --mac --x64
scripts.make:mac:arm64: pnpm run build && pnpm run stage -- --platform darwin --arch arm64 && electron-builder --mac --arm64
scripts.make:win: pnpm run build && pnpm run stage -- --platform win32 && electron-builder --win
scripts.make:win:x64: pnpm run build && pnpm run stage -- --platform win32 --arch x64 && electron-builder --win --x64
scripts.make:win:arm64: pnpm run build && pnpm run stage -- --platform win32 --arch arm64 && electron-builder --win --arm64
scripts.make:linux: pnpm run build && pnpm run stage -- --platform linux && electron-builder --linux
scripts.make:linux:x64: pnpm run build && pnpm run stage -- --platform linux --arch x64 && electron-builder --linux --x64
scripts.make:linux:arm64: pnpm run build && pnpm run stage -- --platform linux --arch arm64 && electron-builder --linux --arm64
